About Me

Sai Sudha Gondi

I'm Sai Sudha, a Data Engineer with 5+ years of experience building data platforms that operate at enterprise scale.

My pipelines process 10TB+ of data daily, run in under 2 minutes, and power the financial and operational decisions of some of the largest organizations in the world. Across my career I've delivered $200K in annual cloud savings, reduced data quality errors by 95%, and improved query performance by 40% — all in production environments where failure isn't an option.

I specialize in real-time streaming with Apache Kafka, lakehouse architecture using Databricks and Delta Lake, and cloud data warehousing on Snowflake and Redshift. I'm equally comfortable on AWS, Azure, and GCP — and I know when to use each one.

I'm currently completing my M.S. in Computer Science while working full-time as a Data Engineer — because I believe the best engineers never stop learning.

I'm open to Data Engineer, Staff DE, and Data Architect opportunities where I can own complex data challenges and drive measurable impact from day one.

📧 saisudhagondi19@gmail.com 📞 (972) 768-0034 🎓 MS Computer Science
Core Expertise
What I Do
End-to-end ownership of data — from raw ingestion to reliable, analytics-ready outputs at scale.
⚡
Real-Time Streaming Pipelines
Kafka + Spark Streaming systems processing millions of events with sub-2 minute latency. Built financial monitoring pipelines at Meta.
🏗️
Data Lakehouse Architecture
Bronze → Silver → Gold Medallion pipelines on Databricks and Delta Lake. ACID-compliant, scalable, and production-reliable.
❄️
Cloud Data Warehousing
Snowflake, Redshift, BigQuery optimization. 35–40% query performance improvement through clustering and materialized views.
🔄
ETL/ELT Pipeline Engineering
Production-grade pipelines with Airflow, dbt, Azure Data Factory, and AWS Glue. Automated 100+ manual data workflows.
✅
Data Quality & Governance
Great Expectations + dbt test suites. Reduced data errors by 95% with automated schema validation and null checks.
☁️
Multi-Cloud Cost Optimization
Auto-scaling, storage tiering, right-sizing across AWS, Azure, GCP. Saved $200K annually at Cognizant.

Growth Roadmap
What I'm Learning Next
Staying ahead of the curve in the fast-evolving data engineering landscape.
🧊
Open Table Formats
Apache Iceberg is replacing Delta Lake — Meta, Netflix, and Apple all run it at scale.
Apache Iceberg — open table format for huge datasets
Apache Hudi — upserts and incremental processing
Project Nessie — Git-like version control for lakes
🤖
AI-Powered Data Eng
LLMs + data: text-to-SQL, AI pipelines, vector data are becoming core DE skills.
Text-to-SQL with LLMs + dbt integration
Vector databases — Pinecone, Weaviate, pgvector
LangChain agents for pipeline monitoring
⚡
Advanced Streaming
Flink is overtaking Spark Streaming for true event-time processing at Staff DE level.
Apache Flink — stateful stream processing at scale
Kafka Streams — lightweight stream processing
Flink SQL — real-time analytics without code
📊
Data Observability
Data reliability skills command senior-level salaries. DataOps is the future.
Monte Carlo / Soda — data observability platforms
OpenLineage + Marquez — end-to-end data lineage
dbt Cloud — advanced macros, packages, CI/CD
